name: Load and Play Back a Real EEG Recording
description: The OpenBCI GUI is open at the System Control Panel. Load and play back the EEG recording file located at ~/Documents/OpenBCI_GUI/Recordings/OpenBCI-EEG-S001-EyesOpen.txt. This recording is from the PhysioNet EEG Motor Movement/Imagery Dataset (Subject 1, baseline recording with eyes open) and contains 8 channels of real human EEG data recorded at 250 Hz, representing approximately 61 seconds of activity. The task is complete when the GUI is playing back the recording with the Time Series widget showing the scrolling EEG waveforms.

metadata.data_subject: Subject S001, Run R01 (eyes open baseline)
